prompt: 帮我做一段 30 秒的视频：一个宇航员漂浮在空间站内，透过舷窗看到地球日出。前半段是空间站内的失重环境，后半段是地球日出的壮观景象。横屏 2.35:1，科幻史诗风格，8K品质。
assertions: Splits into exactly 2 segments (segment 1: <=15s normal generation, segment 2: video extension)
Segment 2 uses '将@视频1延长' pattern for video extension
Each segment includes timestamp storyboard format
Includes connection point description between segments
Uses epic/cinematic structure with quality anchoring (品质锚定)
Includes atmosphere coherence statement (大气连贯声明)
